programme.title: Capítulo 66
programme.desc: Carlos accuses Madariaga of taking bribes from León for Diego to pass his class. Nico says his goodbyes to Miguel and Teo. Celina shuns Mia.

programme.title: Capítulo 67
programme.desc: After he is taken to the principal's office for the rumor of drugs being sold in the school, Joaquín denies everything and puts the blames on Tomás. Roberta and Mia both don't want to spend New Year's with their parents. Their friends throw a beach party and the band performs.

programme.title: Capítulo 68
programme.desc: Miguel saves Mia from a possible self-induced drowning; they kiss. Nico accepts his mother's conditions. José steals some papers and Teo takes the blame.

programme.title: Capítulo 69
programme.desc: Peter asks Mia if she knows that Franco is with Valeria. Tomás's dad finds out about Pascual's foundation and wants to become a part of it.

programme.title: Capítulo 70
programme.desc: Tomás reveals to his friends that Joaquín's forcing him to sell drugs. Joaquín wants Tomás to run drugs outside as well as inside of school. Mia and Celina find out Vico's been lying.

programme.title: Capítulo 71
programme.desc: Tomás decides to run away after the threat of expulsion from the school. Miguel warns Joaquín to tell the truth. Madariaga wants to call the police to handle the situation of drugs in the school.

programme.title: Capítulo 72
programme.desc: The girls get back at their dance professor, Lulu. Mia gets Miguel thrown out of the mall. Alma comes up with a plan to sabotage Franco and Valeria's romance.

programme.title: Capítulo 73
programme.desc: Roberta gets mad at Alma because she's friends with Mia. Madariaga warns Galia to keep an eye on Pilar since she's in a relationship with Joaquín.

programme.title: Capítulo 74
programme.desc: Mia cries after she hears what Miguel thinks of her and seeing him kissing Julieta. Roberta is kicked out by Lupita's mom for playing with Lupita's sister, Dulce.

programme.title: Capítulo 75
programme.desc: Pilar tells her mother, Galia, Joaquín doesn't do drugs because he's an athlete. Alma is afraid that Roberta's father will take Roberta away.

programme.title: Celos y violencia

programme.title: Claustrofobia
programme.desc: Odette visita meta imagen. Victoria no acepta la oferta de Odette. Lili y Niki pelean en el club atlético. Vitoria y Arriaga van a la cita para un nuevo prospecto y quedan atrapados en el elevador.

programme.title: Defensor del abuso
programme.desc: Leo maltrata a Beatriz. Ella abandona su casa. Le pide ayuda a Guzmán. Niki casi descubre a Nelson/kendra. Arriaga/Victoria logran mantener la cita con éxito. Cristina ofrece alojo a Beatriz.

programme.title: Nuevo objetivo
programme.desc: Arriaga desenmascara a Odette. Niki cree q Guzmán defendió a su amante. Tomasina lleva el cheque al papá de Guzmán. Kendra visita a Niki para ir a visitar un diseñador. Tiene un plan para secuestrar a Niki.

programme.title: ¡Que viene mi marido!
programme.desc: Carita inherits 5 million pesos from her godfather but she will not receive the money until she marries and her husband dies. She, her parents and boyfriend decide the a married with a dying man will be the solution of the problem. So, Carita marries Lazaro (who is dying)accepts the situation, but when he sees his fiancé, he recovers health. Lazaro disappear because he was unable to fulfill his compromise. Some days later a newspaper announces Lazaro's death. Nevertheless he reappears suddenly and explains that he is not Lazaro, the real one has died so Carita is a widow and can receive her inheritance. Lazaro and Carita fall in love and marry.

programme.desc: A Woman named Maria de todos los Angeles is finding love. Until she meets a man named Albertano who may be the love of her life. But their relationship is complicated when Albertano family does not approve of Maria de todos Los Angeles

programme.title: María de todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: A Woman named Maria de todos los Angeles is finding love. Until she meets a man named Albertano who may be the love of her life. But their relationship is complicated when Albertano family does not approve of Maria de todos Los Angeles

programme.title: El embarazo de Federica
programme.desc: Ludoviquito le da a su madre un licuado verde (que es en realidad un limpia cañerías), causándole ascos, lo que hace pensar a todos que Federica esta nuevamente embarazada. Y todos sueñan como sería el bebé.

programme.title: Bibi es normal
programme.desc: Federica asusta a Bibi con un sartén para hacerle un test de oído; sin embargo se desmaya y de repente ven que se "vuelve normal" (en realidad se vuelve rebelde y excéntrica, lo que para la familia es normal). Ludovico, cansado del comportamiento de su hija, y tanto Junior como Ludoviquito de que no le preste atención, deciden hacer que tenga otro accidente para que vuelva a ser la de antes. No obstante, Federica la protege mucho de Ludovico ya que le gusta que Bibi sea (lo que ella considera) normal.

programme.title: La chapa
programme.desc: Luis descompone la chapa de la reja, quedando él y Silvia afuera y el resto de los vecinos adentro. En lo que reparan la chapa, los vecinos usan a Luis de mandadero.

programme.title: Los tocatimbres
programme.desc: Germán cree que los timbres del edificio están embrujados, pues alguien los hace sonar constantemente. Luis intenta colocar unas repisas en el cuarto del bebé.

programme.title: Arturo más pordiosero
programme.desc: Los López Pérez se hacen pasar por pordioseros para recibir caridad. Pedro lleva varios días sin bañarse y Cris le exige que lo haga.

programme.title: El parto
programme.desc: Silvia comienza el trabajo de parto en el departamento, no hay tiempo para llegar al hospital. Luis recibirá al bebé con la ayuda de los vecinos.

programme.title: Vecinos consejeros
programme.desc: El hijo de Silvia y Luis no para de llorar y ya no saben qué hacer. Los vecinos les aconsejan cómo cuidar al bebé mientras Germán improvisa un gimnasio en el vestíbulo.

programme.title: Mucha luz
programme.desc: Hay fallas de energía eléctrica en algunos de los departamentos y Luis tiene que ir a trabajar al departamento de los López Pérez. Germán se prepara para su examen de admisión a la preparatoria en línea.

programme.title: Ya valió barriga
programme.desc: Un nuevo inquilino llega al departamento, su nombre es: Hipólito Menchaca y tiene un gran parecido con el famoso actor Édgar Vivar. Los vecinos quieren quedar bien con él.

programme.title: La jefa del Rocko
programme.desc: La mamá de Rocko viene a conocer a su nieto Morris y tiene la intención de llevarlo a vivir con ella y darle la vida que se merece. Liz se vuelve representante de Benito y le consigue un papel en una película.

programme.title: Conserjerito inglés
programme.desc: Germán y compañía toman clases de inglés en línea con Silvia. Cuando Miss Silvia reprueba a Germán, este descubre la forma de desquitarse. Rocko tiene problemas de oído y creen que se está quedando sordo.

programme.title: La toalla del mojado 2
programme.desc: Frankie recibe una visita inesperada, la famosa actriz Lyn May, quien lo inspira a que haga la película de La toalla del mojado 2. Pedro se encarga de cuidar a Luisito Jr. para que Luis pueda descansar.

programme.title: La veterinaria de Vanesa
programme.desc: Vanesa por fin cumple el sueño de tener su propia veterinaria y, con ayuda de su novio Fabián, renta el local que está en el edificio. Los López Pérez compran una lavadora nueva y la colocan en el pasillo frente al departamento de Luis.

programme.title: ¡Qué escándalo!
programme.desc: Morris aprende a tocar la batería y los vecinos se quejan por el ruido. Silvia y Luis descubren que ese ruido arrulla al bebé.

programme.title: Arturo influencer
programme.desc: Arturo se vuelve un famoso influencer de TikTok y Paco de Miguel lo busca para una colaboración. Cris recibe la visita de su hermana Esmeralda y Pedro se siente desplazado.

programme.title: El novio de Virginia
programme.desc: Silvia acude a un diplomado que dura dos días y quiere contratar a una niñera, pero Luis no está de acuerdo. Virginia le quiere declarar su amor a un chico y Germán piensa que es él.

programme.title: Bebé a bordo
programme.desc: En el segundo día del diplomado de Silvia, Luisito Jr. queda al cuidado de Pedrito, pero este permite que todos los vecinos lo cuiden y en un descuido pierden al bebé.

programme.title: Atorón
programme.desc: Es el aniversario de Benito y de Liz, pero él no tiene dinero para festejarlo, por lo que ella le pone un ultimátum para continuar con su relación. Luis y Magda discuten porque ambos quieren usar las escaleras.

programme.title: Primera palabra
programme.desc: Liz ha encontrado el lugar perfecto para que ella y Benito vivan juntos pero, ¿Benito dejará la casa de sus padres? El bebé Luisito ha dicho su primera palabra, pero Luis cree que a Silvita no le gustará cuando se entere de qué ha dicho su hijo.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: Proving Grounds
programme.desc: Empty pots lead to high tensions and low morale.

programme.title: Lousiana Spearfishing and Bowfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to the coast of Louisiana to spearfish and bowfish with Ronnie Collins and Greg Fonts. With ideal conditions, Steve receives a last minute invitation from Ronnie to spearfish during the reintroduced spring Amberjack season. Afterwards, the crew stays up for a late evening of bowfishing for red drum.

programme.title: MeatEater - Montana Muzzleloader Hunting for Mule Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella takes on Montana’s week-long big game heritage season with a traditional muzzleloader. With flintlock in hand, Steve’s after mule deer in a desolate and broken sage brush landscape. After a long few months of evading hunters, these deer have perfected how to stay alive. But stalking a deer into range isn’t the only hurdle to navigate.

programme.title: MeatEater - Texas Turkey with Luke Combs
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to the Yturria Ranch in south Texas, this time, to hunt turkeys and pigs with country musician Luke Combs. Their plans to chase the spring thunder shifts as the weather has a different idea.

programme.title: MeatEater - Welcome to Tanzania
programme.desc: Steven Rinella travels to Tanzania for his first African safari with professional hunter, Morgan Potter. In this episode, Morgan and his team show Steve the ropes of hunting in this foreign terrain for otherworldly big game species. Steve's quest for a cape buffalo moves to the side burner when the team discovers an impressive roan antelope.

programme.title: MeatEater - Into the Clouds: Sitka Blacktail Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella charters a float plane to drop off on a remote lake in Alaskas coastal rainforest for a solo.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Sweetest Meat: Alaskan Black Bear
programme.desc: As summer turns to fall, Steve heads into the backcountry of Alaska's Chugach Range.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Waters Edge: Waterfowl in Alaska
programme.desc: For a waterfowler's dream hunt, Steven Rinella joins his friend, wildlife biologist Brandt Meixell, on a remote trip to some untouched Alaska wetlands in search of ducks and geese. With a spread of decoys and a loyal retriever, they try to get their limit and fill their bellies with willow-spit roasted whole duck.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Rugged Peaks: Alaskan Mountain Goat
programme.desc: Every year, a handful of hunters draw a mountain goat permit to hunt the Mills Creek region of Alaskas Kenai.

programme.title: MeatEater - The New American Food Chain: Wild Pigs
programme.desc: On this trip, Steve travels to the Sacramento Valley in central California in search of a new challenge.

programme.title: MeatEater - Brotherhood, Badlands, and Pack Llamas: Montana Mule Deer
programme.desc: With a trio of cantankerous, spit-hurling pack llamas, Steven heads out.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Roughest Country: Texas Aoudad Sheep
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads into the mountainous desert backcountry of west Texas after Barbary sheep, or Aoudad. These introduced sheep from North Africa are hard to find and harder to hunt. Challenged by the harsh environment, rugged terrain, and elusive sheep, Steve finds this hunt to be one of the most difficult he has ever undertaken.

programme.title: MeatEater - Canyon Bottoms and Cookouts: Texas Javelina
programme.desc: Steven Rinella takes to the canyons of the West Texas desert in search of javelina. In this broken, rocky terrain finding these unique critters isn't easy and getting a clear shot on a skunk pig with a bow is a whole other story. But Steve is inspired by the evidence of he finds of ancient hunters that used the area to prepare a meal that honors both the animal and our hunting ancestors.

programme.title: MeatEater - Big Bucks and Small Game: Wisconsin Whitetail Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads to Wisconsin to spend a few days on his buddys historical family farm to hunt small game.

programme.title: MeatEater - Big Sky, Bigger Birds: Montana Wild Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his brother Matt load up the llamas for a backcountry spring Turkey hunt in Montana's Powder River Breaks. They will pack deep into the rugged badlands to find gobbling birds. With two tags each, there's plenty of action and camp-fried turkey schnitzel is on the menu.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Fair Chase: Arizona Mountain Lion
programme.desc: In the harsh desert Southwest, Steven Rinella has come to learn the truth about tracking a mountain lions.

programme.title: MeatEater - Crossing Borders: Mexican Bison
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads into the mountains of the Sonora Desert on a true, wild, free-ranging bison hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - Strange Hunt in a Strange Land: New Zealand Red Stag
programme.desc: Steven Rinella is on New Zealand's South Island for a do-it-yourself, free-range hunt for the majestic red stag. But first, he needs to secure some camp meat in the form of wild lamb. Battling weather and wary game in mountainous terrain, he uses his spot-and-stalk hunting skills to discover Kiwi red stags are a trophy worthy of the wall and the cook pot.

programme.title: MeatEater - Bush Pig: New Zealand Wild Boar
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and local pig hunting expert, Darren Moore, spend a wild, action-packed day tracking down Captain Cook boars in the thick New Zealand bush. Their tools for the job include two tough little pig dogs, a knife, and some real grit. Wild pigs are dangerous critters and this is as visceral as a hunt gets. Along the way, Steve learns a new technique for field-prepping whole hogs.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Top of the Bottom of the World: New Zealand Thar Part 1
programme.desc: With the help of guide and friend Remi Warren, Steven Rinella gears up for a massive climb into New Zealand's Southern Alps in pursuit of Chamois and Tahr. The hunters will travel light and base out of an alpine hut to find animals Steve has never hunted. Things turns adventurous quickly; with an impassable glacial river between Steve and his goal. But with hard work, Steve experiences a do-it-yourself high country hunt like no other.

Archie is in for a big surprise when one of his passengers turns out to be Sammy Davis Jr. Sammy inadvertently leaves his briefcase behind and arrangements are made for him to retrieve the briefcase at the Bunker house. As usual, Archie's ignorance and bigotry are full force as he nervously awaits Sammy's arrival.

programme.title: Edith, The Judge
programme.desc: One Sunday afternoon, Archie comes home from the laundromat in fury. It seems that he overloaded one of the machines causing the machine to eat his clothes and cause a flood. The irate proprietor of the laundromat, soon stops by the Bunker home to get Archie to pay for the damages but Archie refuses. Soon Edith is called in to act as judge to decide who is at fault in the matter.

programme.title: Archie Is Jealous
programme.desc: Gloria is reading over an old love letter that Mike had sent her. This leads to a conversation between Gloria and Edith concerning an old flame of Edith's with whom she once spent a weekend. However, when Archie hears of Edith's supposed innocent weekend, he hits the roof and demands that Edith not keep any secrets from him.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Edith's cousin, Maude, invites Archie and Edith to the wedding of her daughter, Carol. However, Carol and Maude are not looking forward to Archie, since the man she is marrying happens to be Jewish. Later, the men and the women have their respective bachelor and bachelorette parties, but a grumpy Archie decides to stay in the motel. Meanwhile, Carol realizes just what her fiancée envisions as married life.

programme.desc: When Samantha's away, Serena tries to play and Darrin almost loses his hair over an advertising account.

programme.title: This Little Piggie
programme.desc: Darrin loses his head in another of his mother-in-law's schemes.

programme.title: Mixed Doubles
programme.desc: Samantha's molecules cause a marital mix-up with the Tates.

programme.title: Darrin Goes Ape
programme.desc: Darrin has a hairy escape when Serena zaps him for disobedience.

programme.title: Money Happy Returns
programme.desc: Darrin's day begins with a splash and ends up with unwanted cash.

programme.title: Out Of The Mouths Of Babes
programme.desc: Samantha comes up with the idea to win the account of Mother Flanagan's Irish Stew.

programme.title: Samantha's Psychic Pslip
programme.desc: With Dr. Bombay's help, Samantha and Darrin find that all that glitters is not gold, it may simply be a "gilt-y" conscience.

programme.title: Samantha's Magic Mirror
programme.desc: Samantha's cousin Esmeralda and her old boyfriend have a reunion and when they discover each has lost his magic, they become engaged.

programme.title: Laugh, Clown, Laugh
programme.desc: Endora's annoyance with Darrin proves very uncomfortable to him, but the situation turns out to his advantage.

programme.title: Samantha And The Antique Doll
programme.desc: Darrin's mother thinks she has supernatural powers.

programme.title: How Not To Lose Your Head To Henry VIII (Part I)
programme.desc: Samantha's head is in danger when she catches the eye of Henry VIII.

programme.title: How Not To Lose Your Head To Henry VIII (Part II)
programme.desc: Darrin turns up at the Palace to rescue Samantha - but she must rescue him!

programme.title: Samantha And The Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: Samantha summons cousin Serena to change the Loch Ness monster back into warlock Bruce, but it turns out he was better left as the monster.

programme.title: Samantha's Not So Leaning Tower Of Pisa
programme.desc: Esmeralda decides to right a wrong she committed hundreds of years ago, and she straightens the Leaning Tower of Pisa.

programme.title: Bewitched, Bothered And Baldoni
programme.desc: Venus, noted for her charm, and Endora, noted for her weird sense of humor, team up against Darrin, noted for being the butt of his mother-in-law's tricks.

programme.title: Paris, Witches Style
programme.desc: Samantha's father Maurice is upset that she and Darrin didn't stop off in London to see him, so he takes out his anger on Darrin.

programme.title: Beaver's Fear
programme.desc: Beaver is scared of roller coasters.

programme.title: Three Boys and a Burro
programme.desc: Beaver and his friends buy a burro.

programme.title: Eddie Quits School
programme.desc: Eddie announces he is quitting school.

programme.title: Wally Stays at Lumpy's
programme.desc: Boys arrange overnight plans.

programme.title: Beaver's Laundry
programme.desc: Beaver and Richard do laundry.

programme.title: Lumpy's Car Trouble
programme.desc: Wally breaks rules for borrowing car.

programme.title: Beaver the Babysitter
programme.desc: Beaver baby-sits a 10-year-old.

programme.title: The Younger Brother
programme.desc: Beaver is dropped from basketball team.

programme.title: Beaver's Typewriter
programme.desc: Beaver convinces Ward to buy typewriter.

programme.title: The Merchant Marine
programme.desc: Lumpy wants to join merchant marine.

programme.title: Brother Versus Brother
programme.desc: Girl whom Beaver likes falls for Wally.

programme.title: Yard Birds
programme.desc: Ward orders boys to clean up the yard.

programme.title: Tennis, Anyone?
programme.desc: Girl uses Wally to spite boyfriend.

programme.title: One of the Boys
programme.desc: An exclusive school club recruits Wally.

programme.title: Sweatshirt Monsters
programme.desc: Beaver and pals buy monster sweatshirt.

programme.title: A Night in the Woods
programme.desc: Lumpy and Eddie go camping with Beaver.

programme.title: Long Distance Call
programme.desc: Beaver's pals call pitcher Don Drysdale.

programme.title: Stocks and Bonds
programme.desc: Ward teaches boys about stock investing.

programme.title: Hazel's Cousin
programme.desc: Hazel's highly successful cousin, Susie (Rosemary DeCamp), is preparing to marry the well-known society figure John Lucius (John Archer). However, after Susie's snobbish assistant (Jean Engstrom) learns that Hazel is a maid, she removes Hazel's name from Susie's guest list.

programme.title: Rosie's Contract
programme.desc: After Rosie's boss signs her to a five-year contract, both George and Hazel decide she should be signed to a similar deal — despite the reluctance of Dorothy. After sleeping on it, George and Hazel realize how silly and unnecessary a contract would be.

programme.title: We've Been So Happy Till Now
programme.desc: After George and Dorothy stop speaking to each other following an argument concerning Hazel and neighborhood gossip hints at divorce, Hazel takes matters into her own hands to bring them back together. Jonathan Hole appears as Fulton the milkman, who happens to have a crush on Hazel.

programme.title: How To Lure An Epicure
programme.desc: George's friend Mr. Tonetti (Peter Mamakos) opens a new restaurant and focuses all his energies on impressing Alexander Templeton (Alan Hewitt), a snobby restaurant critic. After the critic pans Tonetti's dishes, Hazel and the Sunshine Girls make sure the critic has a meal to remember, in hopes of getting a better review.

programme.title: Barney Hatfield, Where Are You?
programme.desc: After the Baxters' mailman Barney (Robert B. Williams) calls in sick and can't be located, Hazel goes on the hunt for her friend, using an autographed photo of burlesque dancer Boo-Boo Bedoux (Corrine Cole) as her only clue. Jamie Farr appears as a coffee shop counterman.

programme.title: A Four Bit Word To Chew On
programme.desc: After Mr. Griffin has George set up an educational foundation for disadvantaged youth, George and Hazel try to stump each other with vocabulary words. Mr. Griffin then takes offense at the perceived slight at his lack of education.

programme.title: Hazel's Tax Deduction
programme.desc: The Internal Revenue Service investigates George's tax refund when Hazel claims he didn't deduct enough for her services to his clients.

programme.title: Mr. B. On The Bench
programme.desc: George is offered a judicial position by Arnold Winters (Willis Bouchey), a prominent judge. He considers accepting it, until he realizes Hazel has spread all over town that he is already a judge.

programme.title: License To Wed
programme.desc: Deirdre's daughter Nancy (Davey Davison) is dating Hazel's nephew Eddie and it looks like they plan to marry. Deirdre does not want this since she thinks Eddie is not good enough for her daughter. Hazel thinks they are still too young to marry and uses psychology to prevent it.

programme.title: Genie With The Light Brown Lamp
programme.desc: The Baxters lose their dog Smiley on a road trip. Hazel reads Harold a bedtime story about Aladdin and the Magic Lamp. The next day he sees a gravy boat in a store window and thinks it is a magic lamp. Great things begin to happen for the family and Harold thinks it is because of the lamp.

programme.title: The Natural Athlete
programme.desc: George becomes jealous that Harold idolizes Hazel's championship bowling streak, so George secretly takes bowling lessons under an assumed name. Bill Zuckert appears as a bowling instructor.

programme.title: New Man In Town
programme.desc: Hazel and Rosie fall all over themselves, competing for the affections of a handsome Latin chauffeur (Robert Lowery), and ignoring other suitors.

programme.title: Herbert For Hire
programme.desc: The Johnson's are having some financial problems. Hazel refuses to make any more brownies for Mr. Griffin until he gives Mr. Johnson a job, despite the latter's lone credential being his degree in ancient languages.

programme.title: Hazel And The Lovebirds
programme.desc: Deirdre allows her daughter Nancy to move back from private school on the condition that she date someone other than Hazel's nephew, Eddy. Susan Silo appears as Gabriella, the Johnson's new maid. Robert Hogan appears as Bud, a gas station attendant that Deirdre also won't let Nancy date.

programme.title: Top Secret
programme.desc: Hazel takes Stan's daughter to meet a visiting senator (Larry Gates), but the girl inadvertently walks out with highly classified documents.

programme.title: The Sunshine Girls Quartette
programme.desc: Hazel, Rosie (Maudie Prickett) and a pair of Sunshine Girls team with Mitch (Dub Taylor) to form a musical group. However, a surprise birthday party for Mr. Griffin prevents Hazel from attending an audition in front of a traveling talent scout (Jean Willes).

programme.title: A Good Example For Harold
programme.desc: George uses a white lie to get out of meeting with an insurance agent. When Hazel catches Harold using the same type of white lie, she says everyone has to stop using lies. Hazel then has to tell Mr. Boyle (Philip Ober), the creator of cleaning product and a potential client for George, that the product doesn't work.

programme.title: How to Get Rid of Your Wife
programme.desc: Nagged man drives wife to kill.

programme.title: Three Wives Too Many
programme.desc: Wife teaches polygamist a lesson.

programme.title: Party Line
programme.desc: A woman shares a party line.

programme.title: Cell 227
programme.desc: Condemned man makes a fatal mistake.

programme.title: The Schartz-Metterklume Method
programme.desc: Governess's unusual methods.

programme.title: Letter of Credit
programme.desc: A writer investigates a bank robbery.

programme.title: Escape to Sonoita
programme.desc: Truckers outwit kidnappers.

programme.title: Hooked
programme.desc: A man plans to drown wife.

programme.title: Pen Pal
programme.desc: Escaped convict seeks pen pal.

programme.title: The Baby Blue Expression
programme.desc: Wife mails an incriminating letter.

programme.title: Man Who Found the Money
programme.desc: Man finds $92,000 and trouble.

programme.title: Make My Death Bed
programme.desc: Husband catches wife with another man.

programme.title: The Doubtful Doctor
programme.desc: A man talks about time travel.

programme.title: A Very Moral Theft
programme.desc: Woman steals to save boyfriend.

programme.title: Contest For Aaron Gold
programme.desc: Boy sculpts a one-armed knight.

programme.title: The Five-Forty-Eight
programme.desc: Woman confronts former boss.

programme.title: Outlaw in Town
programme.desc: An outlaw arrives in town.

programme.title: The Lady and the Babysitter
programme.desc: A babysitter has a crush on Laura.

programme.title: The Lady and the Babysitter
programme.desc: A babysitter has a crush on Laura.

programme.title: A Vigilante Ripped My Sports Coat
programme.desc: Rob and Jerry split in fight over grass.

programme.title: The Man From Emperor
programme.desc: Rob is offered a job on a magazine.

programme.title: Romance, Roses and Rye Bread
programme.desc: A secret admirer romances Sally.

programme.title: The Alan Brady Show Goes to Jail
programme.desc: Rob gets locked up with inmates.

programme.title: Three Letters From One Wife
programme.desc: Rob convinces Alan to do a documentary.

programme.title: Pink Pills and Purple Parents
programme.desc: Two pink pills have an effect on Laura.

programme.title: It Wouldn't Hurt Them to Give Us a Raise
programme.desc: The writers demand raise.

programme.title: The Death of the Party
programme.desc: Rob endures a party for Laura's family.

programme.title: My Two Showoffs and Me
programme.desc: Writing team featured in magazine.

programme.title: Stretch Petrie vs. Kid Schenk
programme.desc: An old friend's scheme upsets Rob.

programme.title: The Impractical Joke
programme.desc: Rob seeks revenge against joker.

programme.title: Stacey Petrie, Part I
programme.desc: Rob's brother, Stacey, romances Sally.

programme.title: Stacey Petrie, Part II
programme.desc: Stacey saves his coffeehouse.

programme.desc: The boys are cast in a commercial.

programme.title: The Redcoats Are Coming
programme.desc: The Petries entertain British duo.

programme.title: The Mummy's Tomb
programme.desc: A resurrected mummy seeks the men who defiled its tomb.

programme.title: Night Creatures
programme.desc: Vicar by day, ghostly smuggler (Peter Cushing) by night.

programme.title: Night Monster
programme.desc: Man (Lionel Atwill) hunts doctors who took his legs.

programme.title: The Night Walker
programme.desc: Lawyer (Robert Taylor) advises rich widow (Barbara Stanwyck) plagued by nightmares.

programme.title: The People Under the Stairs
programme.desc: A boy discovers horrific secrets lurking inside a house.

programme.title: Phantom of the Opera

programme.desc: Boys date each other's girls on the sly.

programme.desc: Boys reluctantly take jobs as plumbers.

programme.desc: The boys work as exterminators.

programme.desc: Trio shelters a redhead from an emperor.

programme.desc: Rejected as soldiers, the boys farm.

programme.desc: Matador Stooges provoke jealous husband.

programme.desc: The boys find Aladdin's lamp.

programme.desc: The boys are in burlesque.

programme.title: So Long Mr. Chumps

programme.title: He Cooked His Goose
programme.desc: The love bug bites the boys.

programme.title: Boobs in Arms
programme.desc: The boys unwittingly enlist in the Army.

programme.title: Micro-Phonies
programme.desc: Plumber Stooges audition for radio show.

programme.title: Hot Ice
programme.desc: Tangle with crook and gorilla.

programme.title: Crash Goes the Hash
programme.desc: Reporter Stooges nab a phony noble.

programme.title: Pardon My Backfire
programme.desc: Crooks pull into the Stooges' garage.

programme.title: Fling in the Ring
programme.desc: The boys bribe the wrong boxer.

programme.title: Termites of 1938
programme.desc: Exterminator Stooges impress society.

programme.title: If a Body Meets a Body
programme.desc: Curly is mentioned in a will.

programme.title: Pals and Gals
programme.desc: Cowboy Stooges rescue dance-hall girls.

programme.title: It's Human To Be Humane
programme.desc: Lisa is appointed as head of Hooterville's new "Human Humane" committee. A perfect fit for animal-lover Lisa, and a relief from her boredom in the countryside, she soon has a menagerie of both farm and exotic animals living at Green Acres.

programme.title: Never Take Your Wife To A Convention
programme.desc: Oliver takes Lisa along to an agricultural convention. There, Lisa bonds with an ex-gangster couple, who insist upon teaching the Douglas's some of their shortcuts to successful farming. It turns out to be an offer that Oliver can not refuse.

programme.title: The Computer Age
programme.desc: Oliver champions agri-tech as way to increase productivity on the farm, but when a computer gives its assessment of the Douglas' marriage, Lisa (Eva Gabor) begins to question her union with Oliver. It's bits versus bytes in Green Acres!

programme.title: Lisa's Vegetable Garden
programme.desc: Determined to teach his spendthrift wife Lisa how to save money, Oliver insists that she learn about farming...by growing her own vegetables! In her own inimitable fashion, armed with useless pamphlets from Mr. Kimball, Lisa sets to tilling!

programme.title: The Saucer Season
programme.desc: When handyman Eb (Tom Lester) reports he has seen little green men piloting flying saucers, everyone in Hooterville takes him at his word�even the Air Force�and soon the Douglas farm becomes the Roswell of the greater Pixley area!

programme.title: Kimball Gets Fired
programme.desc: Ralph (Mary Grace Canfield) is distraught when her beloved Mr. Kimball, is fired as the county agricultural agent. Out of a job, Kimball (Alvy Moore) no longer has money enough to marry the lady-carpenter-in-waiting! But wait�did he even want to?

programme.title: The Vulgar Ring Story
programme.desc: Lisa weaves the tale of her great, great grandmother, the Queen of the Gypsies, to explain a bizarre family tradition: a woman in her family must marry an American -- but only every fourth generation -- in order to gain a special inheritance.

programme.title: Who's Lisa
programme.desc: After Oliver (Eddie Albert) accidentally drops a hammer on her head, Lisa (Eva Gabor) develops a case amnesia, with no idea who she is or why she is on a farm in Hooterville�and she adamantly refuses to believe that Oliver is her husband!

programme.title: Music To Milk By
programme.desc: Nothing gets done on the Douglas farm when Oliver (Eddie Albert) gifts Eb (Tom Lester) a top-of-the-line radio for his birthday. Letting nothing stop him, Eb (Tom Lester) enters a radio contest...even when Eleanor the cow swallows the radio whole.

programme.title: The Man For The Job
programme.desc: It's a very official third season premiere for Green Acres when the retirement of a state senator leaves Hooterville considering its best candidate for the job. Of course, they turn to their beloved lawyer-come-farmer Oliver Douglas (Eddie Albert).

programme.title: Lisa's Jam Session
programme.desc: Oliver finds himself in a jam after asking Lisa to make him homemade fruit preserves. An episode deliciously devoted to Lisa's culinary escapades, Lisa musters all of her Hungarian might to make Oliver the best peach jam he's ever tasted.

programme.title: Oliver Vs The Phone Company
programme.desc: After years of substandard service, Oliver is hellbent on throwing the book at the Hooterville Phone Company. When it becomes clear that the local utility oversight board can't do much about it, he decides to handle matters directly.

programme.title: Oliver Takes Over The Phone Company
programme.desc: Mr. Trendell, the president of the Hooterville Phone Company, hands the company over to a delighted Oliver. But after a day of crossed wires and a switchboard repairman with some lose connections of his own, Oliver is ready to call it quits.

programme.title: Don't Count Your Tomatoes Before They're Picked
programme.desc: For the first time, Oliver has a successful crop that needs picking. His tomatoes have grown beautifully. But matters at the phone company continue divide his precious time, so Oliver looks for an interested buyer to take the company off his hands.

programme.title: A Kind Word For The President
programme.desc: Being president of the Hooterville Phone Company has been a rude awakening for Oliver. The switchboard operator is now calling him at five in the morning! After a bevy of new complaints from unhappy customers, Oliver has just about had enough.

programme.title: Eb Elopes
programme.desc: One might think that when Eb takes a vacation things around the farm might go more smoothly. But when Eb elopes, leaving his cousin Walter to take his place, it turns out to be a horrible idea. Walter barely knows a weed from a hole in the ground!

programme.title: The Thing
programme.desc: Lisa is reminded that she stored a birthday present for Oliver years ago: a genuine Stavinsky. But what is it? It's a modern art sculpture that is two parts plumbing pipes, one part tire chains, and one part birdbath. Oliver calls it "The Thing."

programme.title: Das Lumpen
programme.desc: The continually evolving story of how Lisa (Eva Gabor) and Oliver (Oliver) fell in love gets yet another version in this delightful episode. But one thing is for sure: Lisa and Oliver are just as in love today as the day when he fell out of the sky.

programme.title: Crime of Passion
programme.desc: McCall falls in love with architect.

programme.title: The Castro Connection
programme.desc: Rick tries to clear a friend's name.

programme.title: The Stakeout
programme.desc: A tenant is a criminal.

programme.title: I Dream of Choo Choo Rabinowitz
programme.desc: Fred wants to set a record.

programme.title: The Winning Ticket
programme.desc: Two con artists bilk Fred.

programme.title: Committee Man
programme.desc: Fred is offered a bribe.

programme.title: The Windfall
programme.desc: James finds $27,000.

programme.title: Sometimes There's No Bottom in the Bottle
programme.desc: Thelma catches cousin drinking.

programme.title: Heart to Heart
programme.desc: Players answer trivia questions to build a hand of cards closest to 21.

programme.title: Chips and Dip
programme.desc: Players answer trivia questions to build a hand of cards closest to 21.

programme.title: Flush Out a King
programme.desc: Players answer trivia questions to build a hand of cards closest to 21.

programme.title: Stuck in the Frozen Zone
programme.desc: Players answer trivia questions to build a hand of cards closest to 21.

programme.title: Dancing Lady; The Final Round
programme.desc: Aspiring dancer gives up her big break for the man she loves.

programme.title: The Perfect Gentleman; Legend
programme.desc: In order to stay alive, a rock star is disguised as a butler.

programme.title: Purple Mountain Range
programme.desc: Bob paints a river scene.

programme.title: Storm's A Comin'
programme.desc: Bob paints within an oval.

programme.title: Sunset Aglow
programme.desc: Bob paints purple skies.

programme.title: Evening at the Falls
programme.desc: Bob paints a wintry night.

programme.title: Twilight Beauty
programme.desc: Sunshine on a waterside landscape.

programme.title: Angler's Haven
programme.desc: Bob paints a fishing spot.

programme.title: Mountain Blossoms
programme.desc: Dana Jester uses a new technique to paint blossoms.

programme.title: Winter Stillness
programme.desc: Bob paints a silent, picturesque winter scene.

programme.title: Quiet Pond
programme.desc: Bob paints a pond nestled in woodlands.

programme.title: Ocean Sunrise
programme.desc: Audrey Golden uses a black medium to create mood.

programme.title: Bubbling Brook
programme.desc: Bob paints a gurgling brook on black canvas.

programme.title: Arizona Splendor
programme.desc: Bob paints Arizona mountains.

programme.title: Anatomy of a Wave
programme.desc: Joyce Ortner demonstrates the anatomy of a wave.

programme.title: The Windmill
programme.desc: Bob paints a western windmill on black canvas.

programme.title: Autumn Glory
programme.desc: Bob paints a mountain ablaze with autumn color.

programme.title: Crisis In The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: Lurch And His Harpsicord
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: Morticia, The Breadwinner
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family And The Spaceman
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: My Son, The Chimp
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: Morticia's Favorite Charity
programme.desc: Moriticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: Progress And The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: Uncle Fester's Toupee
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: Cousin Itt And The Vocational Counselor
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: Lurch, The Teenage Idol
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Winning Of Morticia Addams
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight, members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: My Fair Cousin Itt
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: Morticia's Romance (Part 1)
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: Morticia's Romance (Part 2)
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: Morticia Meets Royalty
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: Gomez, The People's Choice
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: Cousin Itt's Problem
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: In Your Face
programme.desc: A scientist uses a superhuman bodyguard to fight racists.

programme.title: Werewolves on Wheels
programme.desc: Biker gang falls prey to satanic cult.

programme.title: The Klansman
programme.desc: Racial tensions threaten a rape investigation.

programme.title: The Skyhawk
programme.desc: Master Wong and Fatty face chaos in Thailand.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali
programme.desc: Former heavyweight boxing champion Muhammad Ali is interviewed.

programme.title: Mandrill; LaBelle
programme.desc: Mrs. Georgia Jackson is interviewed by Ellis Haizlip.

programme.title: The Williamsburg Mystery
programme.desc: Mr. T and his team encounter a mystery amid a reconstruction project in Colonial Williamsburg.

programme.title: Death Machine
programme.desc: Hunter dons outrageous garb.

programme.title: The Setup
programme.desc: Hunter must prove a criminal set him up.

programme.title: The Beautiful and the Dead
programme.desc: Hunter finds a blonde murdered.

programme.title: The Beautiful and the Dead
programme.desc: Hunter is robbed of evidence.

programme.title: The Return of Typhoon Thompson
programme.desc: Typhoon Thompson was innocent.

programme.title: Idaho Dirt Bike Tour, Oregon Overland Expo, Silver Kings Hard Enduro adventure
programme.desc: Our Ken Faught and crew head to Idaho to ride dirt bikes at the world-famous Gold Creek Lodge, then hit the Silver Kings Hard Enduro to see what this sport is all about. We top it off with a trip to the Oregon Overland Expo to check out new products.

programme.title: Kauai Overland, Costa Rica Dirt Bike & UTV Adventure, Yamaha Tenere Test
programme.desc: Our Ken Faught and Viola Bautista go overlanding on the Garden Island of Kauai. Our team also rides dirt bikes and drives UTVs in Costa Rica and tests Yamaha's impressive 700cc Tenere adventure bike.

programme.title: Moab Off-Road Adventure, Chase Gardender Solo Traveler, Beta X-Trainer Test

programme.title: 1200-mile Dirt Bike Tour to the Arctice Ocean, Colorado UTV adventure, Bonnell bikes

programme.title: Hawaii UTV Tour, Montana dirt bike adventure, Nobo 10.7 Overland Trailer Test
programme.desc: Viola Bautista and Catherina Bertolino join Ken Faught at the famous Kipu Ranch in Hawaii to experience an amazing UTV tour. We also head to Montana for a dirt bike adventure and test No Boundaries 10.7 Overland Trailer built by Forest River.

programme.title: Utah 4x4 Adventure, Inside Far Out Camping Co., Honda Transalp Test

programme.desc: The enemy loves to trap you in the same old lies: It's not enough, and you're not loved. But God's truth breaks the cycle. When you change what you say, you change what you see, and His presence opens a new loop of peace and hope.

programme.title: He Answered
programme.desc: Pastor Steven gives us three things to remember when life is hard. The enemy wants to keep us circling the wilderness, but God will bring us through as we learn to repeat what leads us to victory.

programme.title: Not Here
programme.desc: Do you ever feel like your prayers are going unanswered? The enemy wants you to believe God's not listening, but the truth is He hears you. His presence is with you in the mountains and the valleys, and He's working one moment at a time.

programme.title: Your Label Is Lying
programme.desc: This sermon is for someone who has been hearing the same lies from the enemy for so long that you've started to believe them. But you are not your issue. You are not your bad decision. It's time to interrupt your story with truth and leave the lies.

programme.title: Do the New You
programme.desc: Reminding people that God has given everyone the decision to grow into who He has created all to be.

programme.desc: Stranded at a motel in Fairvale, California for the night because of a postponed meet, Scott (Tyler Posey) and the others suffer strange experiences that cause them to believe members of their own group may the mysterious killer's newest targets.

programme.title: Currents
programme.desc: As the danger begins to move closer to Scott (Tyler Posey) his trusted mentor and boss, Deaton (Seth Gilliam), is threatened. Meanwhile, Kali (Felisha Terrell) and the twins (Charlie Carver and Max Carver) go after Derek (Tyler Hoechlin).

programme.title: Visionary
programme.desc: Seeking answers, Scott (Tyler Posey). Allison (Crystal Reed) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) hear stories told by two unlikely narrators -- Peter (Ian Bohen) and Gerard (Michael Hogan) -- and discover a secret about the color of a werewolf's eyes.

programme.title: The Girl Who Knew Too Much
programme.desc: As Allison (Crystal Reed) begins to suspect someone close to her may be involved in the murders, Scott (Tyler Posey) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) conclude that Lydia's (Holland Roden) rising talents may be their best bet to solving the murders.

programme.title: The Overlooked
programme.desc: Trapped inside an evacuated Beacon Hills hospital during a powerful storm, Scott (Tyler Posey) and Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) must defend themselves against the Alphas while trying to figure out how to save Cora's (Adelaide Kane) life.

programme.title: Alpha Pact
programme.desc: With the threat growing more personal and time running out, Scott (Tyler Posey) is forced to make a difficult choice to save family and friends while, at the same time, Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) and Peter (Ian Bohen) try to figure out how to save Cora.

programme.title: Lunar Ellipse
programme.desc: In the mid-season finale, under Deaton's advice, Scott (Tyler Posey) and his friends use an ancient but dangerous ritual to help them both save the lives of the people they love and stop Deucalion (Gideon Emery) from achieving his sinister goal.

programme.title: Anchors
programme.desc: Weeks after saving the lives of their parents, Scott, Stiles and Allison suffer strange side effects from their ritual sacrifice. At the same time, the newly enlightened Sheriff Stilinski scours through old cases, looking for supernatural causes.

programme.title: More Bad Than Good
programme.desc: Scott (Tyler Posey) and his friends race to figure out how to catch the Werecoyote Malia before it's hunted down and killed by her father. Meanwhile, Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) and Peter (Ian Bohen) are broken out of captivity by an unlikely ally.

programme.title: Galvanize
programme.desc: On the night before Halloween, Mischief Night, a convicted murderer brought to Beacon Hills Hospital for surgery escapes, forcing Scott (Tyler Posey) and his friends to step in to help when his unexpected target becomes clear.

programme.title: Patient Zero
programme.desc: A military colonel travels into the past from a plagued-ridden future where billions have died from a deadly virus. His mission: track down Patient Zero, the woman who had all three strains of DNA that produced the virus and assassinate her.

programme.title: A New Life
programme.desc: A couple and their friend join a mysterious religious sect in order to lead a more spiritual existence and find a new direction in life. They soon learn, however, that their new-found direction may take them further than they ever thought possible.

programme.title: The Surrogate
programme.desc: Young and artistic Claire Linkwood, who struggles financially to make ends meet, volunteers for a surrogate mother program. But after the embryo is successfully implanted at the clinic, she begins to have nightmares of a most "alien" nature.

programme.title: The Vessel
programme.desc: The lone survivor (Jere Burns) of a space shuttle disaster discovers he's greatly transformed since surviving the crash. For one, his body seems to be indestructible, and he embraces a new-found humanity…courtesy of The Outer Limits.

programme.title: Mona Lisa
programme.desc: Mona Lisa, an android who was created to spy and kill, is designed with superior intelligence. But it is that superior intellect which allows her to evolve, leading her to question the morality of her prime directive...and her own existence.

programme.title: Replica
programme.desc: A biogeneticist clones successfully his wife, who is near death in a coma with no expectation of survival. But when his real wife suddenly awakens from her coma, he finds life with not one, but two wives may be quite complicated.

programme.title: Think Like A Dinosaur
programme.desc: A man (Enrico Colantoni) has second thoughts about a process that transmits a copy of a person light years away but requires that the human "shell" left behind be destroyed in order to maintain a balance in the Universe.

programme.title: Alien Shop
programme.desc: An unemployed man wanders into a curio shop owned by a shape-shifting alien and is offered a rather unique wallet...one that fills with the money of anyone the man comes in physical contact with. However, if it's too good to be true, it often is.

programme.title: Worlds Within
programme.desc: A dying scientist (Joanna Going) makes it her mission to save a mutant "child" -- a link to another dimension of time and space -- from those scientists who seek fame and from shadowy government forces that desire to exploit it.

programme.title: In The Blood
programme.desc: A four-person space crew travels through a wormhole that lands them in an unknown universe where Native American Astrophysicist Callie Whitehorse Landau experiences bizarre hallucinations that reveal the true nature of the entire universe.

programme.title: Flower Child
programme.desc: When an alien seed travels through space and lands on Earth in a rooftop garden, the exotic "flower" it spawns turns out to be an alluring woman who consumes the life and energy out of human victims in the attempt to perpetuate her species on Earth.
